opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like I'm swallowing ground glass, and I haven't been able to drink a single drop of water all day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The throat pain is so bad I've stopped drinking and I feel weak — I'm worried about getting dehydrated.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 days ago with aches, runny nose and sore eyes
symptom_narrative.character: severe raw sore throat, painful swallowing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: like swallowing ground glass; can't drink
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing yet — I've been scared to take tablets because swallowing hurts
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: cough, runny nose, sore red eyes, tired, feels feverish
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: too sore and tired to do much; not drinking

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; fluids available at home

objective_data_offered.value: hasn't been able to drink all day due to pain
both eyes look red/irritated on video
feels feverish; no thermometer at home
